product_updates.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
product_updates.content: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

product_updates.title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
product_updates.content: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

product_updates.title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
product_updates.content: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.

product_updates.title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
product_updates.content: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.

product_updates.title: Cursor now has a mobile app for guiding your coding agent on the go
product_updates.content: Cursor has launched a new mobile app for remote oversight over coding agents.

product_updates.title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
product_updates.content: In addition, TIDAL will use automated tools to remove AI-generated music that attempts to impersonate an artist or a group, the company said.

product_updates.title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
product_updates.content: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.

product_updates.title: Omen AI’s plan to optimize data centers is all wet
product_updates.content: Omen AI raised a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant and stop bacterial outbreaks in data centers.

technical_breakthroughs.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
technical_breakthroughs.content: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.

technical_breakthroughs.title: AI agents are not your “coworkers”

technical_breakthroughs.title: Agent confidence on the technical frontier
technical_breakthroughs.content: Enterprise investment in AI is booming. Gartner is calling 2026 an “inflection year” for organizations to align their AI projects with strategic business objectives. As the pressure to prove ROI mounts, executives and technology leaders are looking to agentic AI to drive the measurable financial …

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: metric weaknesses and AI elephant warnings
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
